comment.body: Geopolitical background as Alma has mentioned: The UAE will invest USD 1.4 trillion in the U.S. over ten years according to an agreed investment framework developed in connection with a visit by national security adviser Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed and a top UAE delegation to the White House.It will significantly increase the UAE's existing investments in the U.S. economy in AI infrastructure, semiconductors, energy and American manufacturing.The UAE delegation included the heads of major UAE sovereign wealth funds and corporations.

Charging barely anything, answering questions, giving incredibly in depth market commentary. And still people want to gripe and quibble tiny issues, they hyper focus on one outcome they want and any outcome that doesn’t match their chosen course of action means that “Alma” was wrong. Please don’t let negativity bias ruin this chat for you Alma 99% of us here are incredibly grateful for what you are doing here.

comment.body:
The sad part is that it's almost on a daily basis, so I understand if she is upset. She spent tons of hours making the content for us. 
She didn't like the rudness on twitter so she ended up starting this substack.
She has said that it will only be for max a year and she wants to teach us more then just buy at the low and sell at the highs. 
So, I truly understand that she if angry that the twitter climate has been brought in here.

comment.body: Some spoon-feeders who lack independent thinking only demand answers without improving their knowledge base—they don't belong here. Additionally, there are competitors attempting to disrupt the community atmosphere because Alma barely charges fees yet disseminates such high-quality knowledge, which threatens their interests. For such individuals, I suggest establishing a dedicated reporting channel where members can submit names and screenshot evidence, followed by periodic blacklisting and removal.
